name: Card Wallet
description: Keep your loyalty and membership passes in one place. Save a card's barcode and luma regenerates it on screen to scan at the till, or tap an NFC card to your phone to capture its tag. Like Stocard, inside luma.
details:
Stop digging through your keychain of plastic tags. Add each loyalty or membership card once — give it a name, pick the barcode symbology (Code 128, EAN-13, UPC, QR, PDF417, Aztec and more), and type in the number. luma redraws the barcode full-screen and high-contrast so any checkout scanner can read it straight off your display.

Got a card that taps instead of scans? On the luma mobile app just hold it to the back of your phone and luma reads the tag straight into the card — a hotel keycard, an NS OV-chipkaart, an MSC wristband and other MIFARE Classic / Ultralight & NTAG tags get their readable blocks copied out as hex, alongside the tag's UID and any NDEF data. Bank and credit cards are deliberately refused: luma detects a contactless payment card and won't copy it. No NFC on hand? Paste the payload in yourself, or anywhere else copy it back out or fall back to the on-screen QR.

Everything lives locally on your device and colour-codes into a tidy wallet grid. Turn on the Card wallet sync collection under Settings to carry the same cards across your paired devices.
